---
title: "Corruption Index"
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
```

## Corruptions Perception Index - Transperancy International

Below is a bar graph which each nations corruption index score followed by their rank in parenthesis.\

```{r}
# Import Dataframe from Corruption Index
corruption_index <- read_excel("CPI2025_Results.xlsx", skip = 2)
corruption_index <- corruption_index %>% 
  select(`Country / Territory`, `CPI 2025 score`, Rank) %>% 
  mutate(Country = `Country / Territory`,
         Score = `CPI 2025 score`) %>%
  filter(Country %in% c('Ghana', 
                    'Nigeria',
                    "Cote d'Ivoire",
                    'Senegal',
                    'Cameroon',
                    'Togo',
                    'Sierra Leone',
                    'Liberia',
                    'United States of America')) %>% 
  select(-`Country / Territory`, -`CPI 2025 score`) %>% 
  mutate(Country = ifelse(Country == "United States of America", "United States", Country),
         Country = ifelse(Country == "Cote d'Ivoire", "Côte d'Ivoire", Country))

```

```{r}
# Graph for Corruption Index
corruption_index %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = Score,
    y = reorder(Country, Score)
  )) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7B83EB") +
  
  # ✅ Label: Score (Rank)
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Score, 1), " (", Rank, ")")),
            hjust = -0.1,
            color = "#7B83EB",
            size = 4) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 10)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 105)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Corruption Perceptions Index (2025)",
    x = "Score",
    y = "Country"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```
